titleStmt.title: SII 38.366: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 366. (A.R. No. 366 of 1912.) DĒVIKĀPURAM, ARNI TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the north wall, first prākāra, Bṛihadāmba temple.

p.hi: King: Kṛishṇadēvarāya Year: Śaka 1444, Vikrama, Kumbha, śu. di., full moon, Friday, uttiram = 22nd February, 1521 A.D.

summary.p: This records that Aṭṭavaṇai Veṅkappar, a native of Sōrappūṇḍi, had endowed (a hamlet) Dēvakāpuram at Śeyyāṟu in Murgamaṅgalappaṟṟu in Mēlkuṉṟa-nāḍu in Palkuṉṟak-kōṭṭam (a sub-division) of Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḷa-maṇḍalam to the god Tirumalaruḍaiyanayiṉār as tirunāmattukkāṇi. For this, the pontiff of the Bhīkshā-maṭha, Īśanaśivāchāriyār, dāṉa-māyēśvarar and kaikkōḷa-mudaligaḷ gifted five hundred kuḻi of each wet and dry lands at Sōrappūṇḍi as tax-free (iṟaiyili-kāṇippaṟṟu), two houses, one at Sōrappūṇḍi and the other at Dēvikāpuram, again made tax-free (iṟaiyilikāṇiyātchi) to Veṅkappar. It is also recorded that both these lands and houses were freed from all the old and new taxes and all other dues and these were to be borne by the above parties. The donee was also to enjoy these lands and houses hereditarily.
Īśanaśivāchāriyār, the pontiff of Bhīkshā-maṭha at Dēvakāpuram, Karaiēraviṭṭa Chandranambi, the tāṉattar and kaikkōḷa-mudaligaḷ and others figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svastiśrī man mahāmaṇḍaleśvaran micura kaṇṭa kaṭṭāri cāḷuva śrīvirappiṟatāpa śrīkṛṣṇatevamakārāyar piṟitivirācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷā ni
ṉṟa śakāptam 1444 meṟ cellā niṉṟa vikramasamvatsarattu kumpaṉāyiṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu Uttiramum pauṇaiyum peṟṟa cukravārattu nāḷ
ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu palkuṉṟakkoṭṭattu mel kuṉṟa nāṭu murukamaṅkalappaṟṟu Irācakempīraṉmalaikku Aṭutta paṟṟu ceyyāṟṟukku teṉpirivāṉa tevakkāpuram
Uṭaiyār tirumalar Uṭaiyanāyiṉāṟku tirunāmakkāṇiyāka kiṟuṣṇatevamakārāyar taṉmamāka corappūṇṭi Aṭṭavaṇai veṅkappar viṭuvikkaiyil tevakkāpuram pikṣāmaṭam yicāṉaci
vācāriyarum tāṉamāyecurar kaikkoḷamutalikaḷum Aṭṭavaṇai veṅkappaṟku kṣettiṟam Iṟaiili kāṇipa
ṟṟu paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi nāṅkaḷ Ivaṟku corappūṇṭiyile nañcaiyile māvaṭit tākkile Aññūṟukuḻiyum puṉcaiyile Eri Eturvāyile Aññūṟu
kuḻiyum corappūṇṭiyile Oru maṉaiyum tevakkāpuram maṇiyakāṟat teruvile Oru maṉaiyum Ivaṟku nāṅkaḷ Iṟaiili kāṇiyākṣiyāka kumutappaṭaiyile kalve
ṭṭik kuṭuttom Inta maṉaiyum nilattaiyum nokki kopuravācalile yiṟakkum paḻavari putuvariyum Eppeṟpaṭṭa cakalavakaiyum Uḷpaṭa Ittainokki vanta kāriya
ṅka(ṅka)ḷ Ellām nāṅkaḷe Uttarac collakkoḷḷak kaṭavomākavu Immatikaḷikku Inta maṉai Iraṇṭum nañcaiyile Aññūṟṟu kuḻiyu puṉcaiyile Aññūṟṟu kuḻiyum
iṟaiili kāṇiyāṭciyāka cantiṟātittavaraiyum puttirapavuttira pāramparaiyāka Aṉupavittukkoḷḷak kaṭavarākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu Aṭṭavaṇai veṅkappaṟku Iṟai
ili kāṇiyāṭci paṇṇikkuṭuttom tevakkāpuram pikṣāmaṭam yicāṉa civācāriyar Eḻuttu tāṉattār karaiēṟaviṭṭa cantiranampi Uḷḷiṭṭār Eḻuttu
nayiṉār Eḻuttu māyecurartirumalaiccivaṉ kaṅkāṇiccivaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār Eḻuttu kaikkoḷamutalikaḷ yicura kaḷappāḷar naraciṅka kāliṅkarāyar nā
ṉār kollāviṭṭār tampirāṉ toḻar vallāṉai veṉṟār kaṇṭiya tevar veṭanayiṉār Uḷḷiṭṭa kaikkoḷamutalikaḷ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivarkaḷ colla Eḻu
Uttaṇṭi Eḻuttu Inta taṉmattukku Ahitam paṇṇiṉavarkaḷ keṅkaikkaraiyil kārāmpacuvaikkoṉṟa pāvattile pokak kaṭavārkaḷ Ākavum .
Digital edition of SII 38.366 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
